case_title: NATALY ALEJANDRA PEREZ VS. GREENV, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, NATALY ALEJANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT GREENV, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
